choices.text: Hardhat (Node.js/TS) — mature ecosystem, TS tests, plugin-rich. Foundry (Rust + Solidity) — fastest compile/test, built-in fuzzing, Solidity-native tests. Modern projects often use both: Foundry for tests, Hardhat for deploy.

questions.explanation: Hardhat for ecosystem, Foundry for speed + fuzzing.

choices.text: Foundry: function testFuzz_X(uint256 input) public — automatically generates random inputs, tries invariant assertions, shrinks failures. Built into forge test. Catches edge cases manual testing misses.

questions.explanation: Foundry built-in fuzzing via testFuzz_ prefix.
